name: Primineral Mandstrong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>泥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>岩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マンドストロング
desc: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was destroyed by an opponent's card effect this turn while it was Set on your field: You can Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 monster from your GY to your hand, except "Primineral Mandstrong". You can only use this effect of "Primineral Mandstrong" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. During the End Phase, if this card is in the GY because it was destroyed by an opponent's card effect this turn while it was Set on your field: You can Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 monster from your GY to your hand, except "Primineral Mandstrong". You can only use this effect of "Primineral Mandstrong" once per turn.
eff: You can Set this card from your hand to your Spell & Trap Zone as a Spell. You can only use this effect of "Primineral Mandstrong" once per turn.

action: Sets itself from the hand as a Spell Card
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
